creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Ashish SHUKLA from comment #1)

Thanks for closing this.
Actually, this was already fixed at commit 4cef8f14aceb0c4a94263466f54cbc28fe89bad2 [1] by Muhammad Moinur Rahman <bofh@FreeBSD.org> at 2023-04-30 22:38:45 +0000 in conjunction with adding desktop-file-utils to USES, but I forgot to close this as "Overcome by event".

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=4cef8f14aceb0c4a94263466f54cbc28fe89bad2
